en: Most English learners say these words wrong.
ko: 대부분의 영어 학습자들이 이 단어들을 잘못 발음해. 너는?
ja: ほとんどの英語学習者はこれらの単語を間違って発音します。
zhTW: 大部分英語學習者都把這些字唸錯了。
vi: Hau het nguoi hoc tieng Anh deu phat am sai nhung tu nay.

en: Notice there is a silent letter, awkward, different, different.
ja: サイレントレターがあることに注目。awkward、different、different。
zhTW: 注意有一個不發音的字母。awkward。different，different。
vi: Chu y co mot chu cai cam. Awkward. Different, different.

en: This also has a silent letter, different, family, family.
ko: different. 이것도 묵음이 있어. different. family
ja: これにもサイレントレターがあります。different、family、family。
zhTW: 這個也有一個不發音的字母。different。family，family。
vi: Tu nay cung co chu cai cam. Different. Family, family.

en: This also has a silent letter, family.
ko: family. 이것도 묵음이 있어. family. 이 문장을 같이 말해보자. My
ja: これにもサイレントレターがあります。family。
zhTW: 這個也有一個不發音的字母。family。
vi: Tu nay cung co chu cai cam. Family.

en: Let's say this sentence together. My family is awkward and different.
ko: family is awkward and different. My family is awkward and different.
ja: この文を一緒に言いましょう。My family is awkward and different.
zhTW: 我們一起說這個句子。My family is awkward and different.
vi: Hay noi cau nay cung nhau. My family is awkward and different.

en: My family is awkward and different.
ko: family is awkward and different. My family is awkward and different.
ja: My family is awkward and different.
zhTW: My family is awkward and different.
vi: My family is awkward and different.

ko: 더 많은 영어 레슨을 위해 구독해줘
ja: もっと英語レッスンが欲しい方はチャンネル登録を。
zhTW: 訂閱觀看更多英語課程。
vi: Dang ky de xem them bai hoc tieng Anh.
